title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The models represent a full-stack strategy to challenge OpenAI by building proprietary reasoning capabilities, always-on agents, and quantum hardware.
